title: Magical Mild Japanese Lemongrass Takoyaki
description: A festive Japanese dish featuring lemongrass, with a herbal and glassy-jelly texture, made with halal-friendly ingredients and deep-fried to perfection in a takoyaki form.
instructions: Combine lemongrass, flour, water, salt, and sugar in a bowl and mix until smooth.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Using a takoyaki pan, pour the batter into each mold and add diced octopus and tempura bits.
Cook the takoyaki for 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
Remove the takoyaki from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the takoyaki hot with takoyaki sauce, green onion, and additional lemongrass if desired.
Repeat the cooking process until all the batter is used up.
